settings.hero_subtitle: Twelve attars, one for every rashi. Wear your zodiac energy as a fragrance.
settings.content_body: Each of the twelve rashis carries a unique energetic signature. Our Zodiac Attar series translates these signatures into fragrance — so you can wear your cosmic identity as a quiet, powerful presence.
settings.cta_title: Wear Your Zodiac as Your Aura
settings.cta_subtitle: The right fragrance does more than smell beautiful — it aligns you with your own energy.
